function.name: execute_python_code
function.description: Executes a string of Python code to solve math, physics, or logic problems and returns the printed output.

function.name: control_hardware_motors
function.description: Sends commands to the physical robot hardware to move specific body parts.

body_part.description: The physical part of the robot to move.

function.name: get_current_weather
function.description: Gets the current weather for a specific location.

location.description: The city and country, e.g., Cairo, Egypt.

function.name: perform_deep_search
function.description: Searches the internet for real-time information, news, or facts.

query.description: The exact search query to look up on the web.
